note: Used to estimate monthly PIA (Primary Insurance Amount) at Full Retirement Age from current salary. Constant-dollar method matches SSA Quick Calculator.

taxableMaximum.description: Maximum earnings subject to Social Security tax, by year

bendPoints.description: PIA formula bend points for workers turning 62 in 2025

piaFormula.description: PIA = 90% of AIME up to first bend + 32% between bends + 15% above second bend
